content.full_text:
Memorandum

To: File

Date: Feb. 11, 1983
No. T-83-034

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
        Janis Shank McLean

Subject: Telephone Advice
        Mr. Serato

A planning commissioner who is a member of a host committee for a councilmember's fundraiser is "soliciting" contributions within the meaning of Government Code Section 84308.
